    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    A

    add(Tile) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Tiles
    Adds a tile to the collection.
    addAnimal(Animal) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.FauneBag
    Adds an animal to the bag.
    addNatureToken() - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.game.Player
     
    allHabitats() - Static method in enum class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Habitat
    Returns a list of all habitats.
    animal() - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.FamilyScoreCard
    Returns the value of the animal record component.
    animal() - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.IntermediateScoreCard
    Returns the value of the animal record component.
    animal() - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.TileAnimalPair
    Returns the value of the animal record component.
    Animal - Enum Class in fr.uge.cascadia.structure
    Represents the different animal species in the Cascadia game.
    animalList() - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.FauneBag
    Returns a list of all distinct animals in the bag.
    animalPlacementError(Graphics2D, Animal) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.view.GameViewHex
    Displays an error message when an animal cannot be placed on the board.
    animalPlacementError(Graphics2D, Animal) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.view.GameViewSquare
    Displays an error message when an animal cannot be placed on the board.
    animalPlacing(Animal) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.game.Player
    Allows the player to place an animal on the board.
    asTile() - Method in interface fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Lot
    Converts the lot to a Tile.
    asTile() - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Tile
    Returns this instance as a Tile.
    asTile() - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.TileAnimalPair
    Converts the lot to a Tile.
    asTileAnimalPair() - Method in interface fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Lot
    Converts the lot to a TileAnimalPair.
    asTileAnimalPair() - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Tile
    Throws an exception, as this instance cannot be cast to TileAnimalPair.
    asTileAnimalPair() - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.TileAnimalPair
    Converts the lot to a TileAnimalPair.

    B

    BEAR - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Animal
     
    BearScore - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score
    Represents the scoring mechanism for the Bear species in the Cascadia game.
    BearScore(ScoreRule) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.BearScore
    Constructs a BearScore with the specified scoring rule.
    BearScore(String) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.BearScore
    Constructs a BearScore with a randomly selected scoring rule.
    BearScoreCardA - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards
    Represents the scoring rule for Bear groups based on the number of pairs of bears.
    BearScoreCardA() - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.BearScoreCardA
    Creates an instance of a BearScoreCardA record class.
    BearScoreCardB - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards
    Represents the scoring rule for Bear groups specifically targeting groups of size 3.
    BearScoreCardB() - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.BearScoreCardB
    Creates an instance of a BearScoreCardB record class.
    BearScoreCardC - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards
    Represents the scoring rule for Bears that awards points based on group sizes and provides a bonus for having groups of all specified sizes.
    BearScoreCardC() - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.BearScoreCardC
    Creates an instance of a BearScoreCardC record class.
    BearScoreCardD - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards
    Represents the scoring rule for Bears that awards points based on group sizes.
    BearScoreCardD() - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.BearScoreCardD
    Creates an instance of a BearScoreCardD record class.
    BUZZARD - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Animal
     
    BuzzardScore - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score
    Represents the scoring mechanism for the Buzzard species in the Cascadia game.
    BuzzardScore(ScoreRule) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.BuzzardScore
    Calculates the score for the given player based on groups of Buzzards.
    BuzzardScore(String) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.BuzzardScore
    Constructs a BearScore with a randomly selected scoring rule.
    BuzzardScoreCardA - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards
    Represents the scoring rule for Bear groups based on the number of pairs of bears.
    BuzzardScoreCardA() - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.BuzzardScoreCardA
    Creates an instance of a BuzzardScoreCardA record class.
    BuzzardScoreCardB - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards
    Represents the scoring rule for Buzzards based on isolated buzzards with at least one other in line of sight.
    BuzzardScoreCardB() - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.BuzzardScoreCardB
    Creates an instance of a BuzzardScoreCardB record class.
    BuzzardScoreCardC - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards
    Represents the scoring rule for Buzzards based on lines of sight.
    BuzzardScoreCardC() - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.BuzzardScoreCardC
    Creates an instance of a BuzzardScoreCardC record class.
    BuzzardScoreCardD - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards
    Represents the scoring rule for Buzzards based on pairs in straight lines.
    BuzzardScoreCardD() - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.BuzzardScoreCardD
    Creates an instance of a BuzzardScoreCardD record class.

    C

    calculateAnimalsScore(int, String, FauneBag) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.score.ScoreCalculator
    Calculates the player's animal scores based on the chosen scoring method.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.BearScore
    Calculates the score for the given player based on the selected bear scoring rule.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.BuzzardScore
    Calculates the score for the given player based on the selected bear scoring rule.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.BearScoreCardA
    Calculates the score for a player based on the number of pairs of Bears found in their environment.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.BearScoreCardB
    Calculates the score for a player based on the number of groups of exactly 3 Bears found in their environment.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.BearScoreCardC
    Calculates the score for a player based on the sizes of Bear groups found in their environment.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.BearScoreCardD
    Calculates the score for a player based on the sizes of Bear groups found in their environment.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.BuzzardScoreCardA
    Calculates the score for a player based on the number of pairs of Bears found in their environment.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.BuzzardScoreCardB
     
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.BuzzardScoreCardC
     
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.BuzzardScoreCardD
     
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.ElkScoreCardA
    Calculates the score for a given player based on the ElkScoreCardA rule.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.ElkScoreCardB
    Calculates the score for a given player based on the ElkScoreCardB rule.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.ElkScoreCardC
    Calculates the score for a given player based on the ElkScoreCardC rule.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.ElkScoreCardD
    Calculates the score for a given player based on the ElkScoreCardD rule.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.FoxScoreCardA
    Calculates the score for the player based on the "A" Fox scoring rule.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.FoxScoreCardB
    Calculates the score for the player based on the "B" Fox scoring rule.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.FoxScoreCardC
    Calculates the score for the player based on the "C" Fox scoring rule.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.FoxScoreCardD
    Calculates the score for the player based on the "D" Fox scoring rule.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.SalmonScoreCardA
    Calculates the score for a player based on the size of Salmon groups, with incremental scoring for groups of varying sizes.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.SalmonScoreCardB
    Calculates the score for a player based on the size of Salmon groups, with a maximum score for groups of 5 Salmons.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.SalmonScoreCardC
    Calculates the score for a player based on the size of Salmon groups.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.SalmonScoreCardD
    Calculates the score for a player based on the Salmon groups and their adjacent animals.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in interface fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.ScoreRule
    Calculates the score for the given player based on the specific scoring rule of the implementing animal card.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.ElkScore
    Calculates the score for the given player based on the selected Elk scoring rule.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.FamilyScoreCard
    Calculates the score for the given player using the family rule.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.FoxScore
    Calculates the score for the given player using the selected fox scoring rule.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.HabitatScore
    Calculates the score for the given player based on the size of the largest group of adjacent tiles of the specified habitat type on their board.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.IntermediateScoreCard
    Calculates the score for the given player based on the size of the groups of the specified animal on their board.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.SalmonScore
    Calculates the salmon score for the given player using the selected rule.
    calculateScore(Player) - Method in interface fr.uge.cascadia.score.ScoringRule
    Calculates the score for a specific player based on the implemented rule.
    calculateSides(ImageLoader, int) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Tile
     
    calculateTilesScore() - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.score.ScoreCalculator
    Calculates the score for habitats.
    calculateTotalScore(Map<Animal, Integer>, Map<Habitat, Integer>, Map<Habitat, Integer>, int) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.score.ScoreCalculator
    Calculates the total score by summing animal and habitat scores.
    canAcceptAnimal(Animal) - Method in interface fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Lot
    Checks if the lot can accept the specified animal.
    canAcceptAnimal(Animal) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Tile
    Checks if the tile can accept the specified animal.
    canAcceptAnimal(Animal) - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.TileAnimalPair
    Checks if the lot can accept the specified animal.
    canPlaceAnimal(Animal) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.game.Environnement
    Checks if an animal can be placed on the board.
    cardChoice() - Static method in class fr.uge.cascadia.game.GameChoices
    Prompts the user to choose a card for the "Animal cards" game mode.
    checkNumberFaune(FauneBag) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.GameLot
    Checks for animals that occur too frequently in the available pairs and replaces them if needed.
    chooseAnimalClick(ApplicationContext, int, int, int, int, FauneBag) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.view.GameViewHex
    Handles the player's interaction to select an animal by clicking.
    chooseHexLotClick(ApplicationContext, int, int, int, int, Tiles, FauneBag) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.view.GameViewHex
    Handles the player's interaction to select a hexagonal tile-animal pair by clicking.
    chooseLot(GameLot) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.game.Player
    Allows the player to choose a TileAnimalPair from the available lots.
    chooseLotClick(ApplicationContext, int, int) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.view.GameViewSquare
    Waits for the user to click on an available lot and returns the selected TileAnimalPair.
    chooseTileClick(ApplicationContext, int, int, int, int, Tiles) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.view.GameViewHex
    Handles the player's interaction to select a tile by clicking.
    clone() - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Tile
     

    D

    determineAchievements(SuccessManager, int, Map<Habitat, Integer>, int) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.score.PlayerProgress
    Determines the player's achievements based on their scores and a list of all available successes.

    E

    ELK - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Animal
     
    ElkScore - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score
    Represents the scoring mechanism for the Elk species in the Cascadia game.
    ElkScore(ScoreRule) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.ElkScore
    Constructs an ElkScore with a specific scoring rule.
    ElkScore(String) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.ElkScore
    Constructs an ElkScore with a randomly selected scoring rule.
    ElkScoreCardA - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards
    Represents the scoring rule for Elk based on the ElkScoreCardA.
    ElkScoreCardA() - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.ElkScoreCardA
    Creates an instance of a ElkScoreCardA record class.
    ElkScoreCardB - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards
    Represents the scoring rule for Elk based on the ElkScoreCardB.

    Creates an instance of a ElkScoreCardB record class.
    ElkScoreCardC - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards
    Represents the scoring rule for Elk based on the ElkScoreCardC.

    Creates an instance of a ElkScoreCardC record class.
    ElkScoreCardD - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards
    Represents the scoring rule for Elk based on the ElkScoreCardD.
    ElkScoreCardD() - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.ElkScoreCardD
    Creates an instance of a ElkScoreCardD record class.
    ensureCapacity(int, int) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.game.Environnement
    Ensures the game board has enough capacity to place a tile at the specified coordinates.

    Represents the game environment for Cascadia.
    Environnement(int, int, boolean) - Constructor for class fr.uge.cascadia.game.Environnement
    Initializes the game board with the specified dimensions.

    F

    FamilyScoreCard - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score
    Represents a scoring card for the family rule in the Cascadia game.
    FamilyScoreCard(Animal) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.FamilyScoreCard
    Constructs a FamilyScoreCard for the specified animal.
    FauneBag - Class in fr.uge.cascadia.structure
    Represents a bag containing a collection of animals in the Cascadia game.
    FauneBag() - Constructor for class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.FauneBag
    Constructs a new FauneBag and initializes it with 20 of each Animal.
    finalLotChoice(ApplicationContext, int, int, int, int, String, Tiles, FauneBag) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.view.GameViewHex
    Handles the final choice of a lot (tile-animal pair) by a player, considering the use of nature tokens.
    findAnimalGroups(Animal) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.game.Environnement
    Finds all groups of TileAnimalPair for a specific animal on the board.
    findLargestHabitatGroup(Habitat) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.game.Environnement
    Finds the largest group of connected tiles with the same habitat.
    FOREST - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Habitat
     
    FOX - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Animal
     
    FoxScore - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score
    Represents the scoring mechanism for the fox animal in the Cascadia game.
    FoxScore(ScoreRule) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.FoxScore
    Constructs a FoxScore with the specified scoring rule.
    FoxScore(String) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.FoxScore
    Constructs a FoxScore with a randomly selected scoring rule.
    FoxScoreCardA - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards
    Implements the scoring rule for Foxes according to the "A" card in the Cascadia game.
    FoxScoreCardA() - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.FoxScoreCardA
    Creates an instance of a FoxScoreCardA record class.
    FoxScoreCardB - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards
    Implements the scoring rule for Foxes according to the "B" card in the Cascadia game.
    FoxScoreCardB() - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.FoxScoreCardB
    Creates an instance of a FoxScoreCardB record class.
    FoxScoreCardC - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards
    Implements the scoring rule for Foxes according to the "C" card in the Cascadia game.
    FoxScoreCardC() - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.FoxScoreCardC
    Creates an instance of a FoxScoreCardC record class.
    FoxScoreCardD - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards
    Implements the scoring rule for Foxes according to the "D" card in the Cascadia game.
    FoxScoreCardD() - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.FoxScoreCardD
    Creates an instance of a FoxScoreCardD record class.

    G

    GameChoices - Class in fr.uge.cascadia.game
    Provides utility methods for gathering player input and game settings.
    GameChoices() - Constructor for class fr.uge.cascadia.game.GameChoices
     
    GameLot - Class in fr.uge.cascadia.structure
    Represents the collection of available tile-animal pairs (lots) in the Cascadia game.
    GameLot() - Constructor for class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.GameLot
    Constructs an empty GameLot.
    GameManager - Class in fr.uge.cascadia.game
    Manages the Cascadia game, including initialization, turns, and score calculation.
    GameManager(int, List<String>, int) - Constructor for class fr.uge.cascadia.game.GameManager
    Constructs a new GameManager instance, initializing the game environment, players, and the available tiles and lots.
    gameModeChoice() - Static method in class fr.uge.cascadia.game.GameChoices
    Prompts the user to choose a game mode.
    gameTiles(int, boolean) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Tiles
    Prepares the tiles for gameplay based on the number of players and the mode chosen for the game either square tiles or hexagonal tiles.
    GameViewHex - Class in fr.uge.cascadia.view
    Manages the graphical rendering and user interactions for the Cascadia game with hexagonal tiles.
    GameViewHex(GameManager, ImageLoader) - Constructor for class fr.uge.cascadia.view.GameViewHex
    Creates a new instance of GameViewHex.
    GameViewSquare - Class in fr.uge.cascadia.view
    Provides methods to render and interact with the graphical interface of the game Cascadia.
    GameViewSquare(GameManager, ImageLoader) - Constructor for class fr.uge.cascadia.view.GameViewSquare
    Constructs a GameView with the specified GameManager.
    get(int) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.GameLot
    Retrieves a tile-animal pair at the specified index.
    getAllSuccesses() - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.score.SuccessManager
    Retrieves all successes.
    getAnimals() - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.game.GameManager
    Retrieves the bag of animals used in the game.
    getAnimals() - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.FauneBag
    Retrieves the map of animals and their counts in the bag.
    getAnimals() - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Tile
    Retrieves the animals associated with this tile.
    getAvailableLot() - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.game.GameManager
    Retrieves the current available tile-animal pairs (lots) for the game.
    getBoard() - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.game.Player
    Returns the player's game board.
    getBonuses() - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.score.MajorityBonus
    Retrieves the computed bonuses.
    getColCount() - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.game.Environnement
    Returns the number of columns in the environment.
    getCoordinates(Lot) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.game.Environnement
    Finds the coordinates of a specific Lot on the board.
    getCurrentRotation() - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Tile
    Returns the current rotation of the tile.
    getHabitats() - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Tile
    Retrieves the habitats associated with this tile.

    Retrieves a preloaded image from the cache.

    Returns the name of the player.
    getNatureTokens() - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.game.Player
    Returns the player's nature tokens.

    Retrieves the neighbors of a given Lot on the board.

    Retrieves the player associated with the specified name.

    Returns the number of rows in the environment.

    hexTiles() - Static method in class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Tile
    Generates a set of hexagonal tiles with two habitats and 2 or 3 allowed animals selected randomly for the game with hexagonal tiles.

    I

    idealTiles() - Static method in class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Tile
    Generates a set of 25 ideal tiles for the game with hexagonal tiles.

    Utility class to load and cache images for the Cascadia game.

    Initializes the available pairs with randomly selected tiles and animals.

    initHexFirstTiles() - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Tiles
    Initializes the predefined sets of hexagonal first tiles for players.

    Represents the scoring mechanism for the "Intermediate" scoring card in the Cascadia game.

    Constructs an IntermediateScoreCard for the specified animal.

    Checks if two Lot objects are adjacent on the board.

    Determines if the provided Lot is an "ideal tile" in the Cascadia game.

    Checks if the lot is a Tile.
    isTile() - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Tile
    Checks if this instance is a tile.
    isTile() - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.TileAnimalPair
    Checks if the lot is a Tile.
    isTileAnimalPair() - Method in interface fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Lot
    Checks if the lot is a TileAnimalPair.
    isTileAnimalPair() - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Tile
    Checks if this instance is a tile-animal pair.
    isTileAnimalPair() - Method in record class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.TileAnimalPair
    Checks if the lot is a TileAnimalPair.

    loadSuccesses() - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.score.SuccessManager
    Loads successes from a resource file into the instance map.

    placeAnimal(Animal, int, int) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.game.Environnement
    Places an animal on a tile at the specified coordinates.

    Handles the placement of an animal on the board based on user clicks.
    placeAnimalClick(Event, Animal, String, int, int, int) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.view.GameViewHex
    Handles the placement of an animal on the board by a player via mouse click.

    Handles the placement of a hexagonal tile by a player via mouse click.

    Checks if a tile can be placed at the specified coordinates.

    Places a tile on the board at the specified coordinates.

    Handles the placement of a tile on the board based on user clicks.

    Represents a player in the Cascadia game, responsible for placing tiles and animals on their board and calculating scores.

    Renders the selected tile-animal pair in the interface.

    Replaces all occurrences of a specific animal in the pairs with new animals.

    S

    SALMON - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.cascadia.structure.Animal
     
    SalmonScore - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score
    Represents the scoring mechanism for salmon in the Cascadia game.
    SalmonScore(ScoreRule) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.SalmonScore
    Constructs a SalmonScore with the specified rule.
    SalmonScore(String) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.SalmonScore
    Constructs a SalmonScore with a randomly selected rule.
    SalmonScoreCardA - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards
    Represents the scoring rule for Salmon groups with incremental scoring based on group size.
    SalmonScoreCardA() - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.SalmonScoreCardA
    Creates an instance of a SalmonScoreCardA record class.
    SalmonScoreCardB - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards
    Represents the scoring rule for Salmon groups with a maximum size limit.
    SalmonScoreCardB() - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.SalmonScoreCardB
    Creates an instance of a SalmonScoreCardB record class.
    SalmonScoreCardC - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards
    Represents the scoring rule for Salmon groups based on their size.
    SalmonScoreCardC() - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.SalmonScoreCardC
    Creates an instance of a SalmonScoreCardC record class.
    SalmonScoreCardD - Record Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards
    Represents the scoring rule for Salmon based on their groups and adjacent animals.
    SalmonScoreCardD() - Constructor for record class fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards.SalmonScoreCardD
    Creates an instance of a SalmonScoreCardD record class.
    saveAchievements(Map<Animal, Integer>, Map<Habitat, Integer>, int) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.game.Player
    Saves the player's achievements to a file located in the "ressources/success" directory.
    saveProgress(String, int, List<Integer>) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.score.PlayerProgress
    Saves the player's progress to a file.
    ScoreCalculator - Class in fr.uge.cascadia.score
    Manages score calculations for a specific player using Java Streams.

    Constructs a ScoreCalculator for the given player.
    ScoreRule - Interface in fr.uge.cascadia.score.cards
    Represents the scoring rule for an animal card in the Cascadia game.
    ScoringRule - Interface in fr.uge.cascadia.score
    Represents a scoring rule for the Cascadia game.

    showCombinedScoreZen(Graphics2D, Map<Animal, Integer>, Map<Habitat, Integer>, Map<Habitat, Integer>, int, String) - Method in class fr.uge.cascadia.view.GameViewHex
    Displays the combined score of a player in Zen mode, including animal, tile, and nature token scores.

    Displays the combined scores (animal scores, tile scores, and bonuses) for a specific player on the graphical interface.

    Displays the current available lots of hexagonal tiles and animals on the game screen.

    Renders the list of available lots on the screen.

    Displays the selected tile-animal pair on the game screen.

    Generates the 6 sides of the hexagonal tile based on the current rotation.
